evals.prompt: Scan this Express.js project and export all API endpoints as a Postman collection I can import. Include test scripts for each request.
evals.expected_output: postman/*.postman_collection.json valid v2.1 format with folders per resource, {{baseUrl}} variables, test scripts on each request, and docs/api-reference.md with curl examples

evals.prompt: What APIs do we have in this codebase? Document them and give me a Postman collection file.
evals.expected_output: Complete endpoint inventory in markdown plus importable Postman collection JSON passing validate_collection.py

evals.prompt: We have an openapi.yaml but I'm not sure it's up to date. Cross-check against the code and generate a Postman collection with realistic example payloads and auth setup.
evals.expected_output: Postman collection with Auth folder, bearer token variable, discrepancy notes in api-reference.md, saved response examples per endpoint
